delivery.raw: 主に対面（全開講回数の過半数）、一部オンライン

rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: The principles will be explained and demonstrated by lecturer. Students will practice and train English speaking in small groups. At the end of the course, a short oral presentation and discussion in English on the selected scientific topic will be conducted by the students. The course will be done mostly in English.
aims: This class aims to teach and practice the basic vocabulary and skills necessary for oral communication on scientific topics in English.
goals: Become able to send a professional e-mail in English.
Become able to write a study abstract in English.
Become able to prepare a scientific presentation in English.
Become able to ask and reply scientific questions in English.

plan.text:
Guidance, Self-evaluation quiz I
Self-introduction (conversation practice)
E-mail communication skills (lecture)
AI and scientific communication

E-mail communication skills summary
Conversation game
Explanation and discussion on topics: Why are presentation and discussion skills important? How to prepare and deliver good presentation?

TED talk listening and comprehension test.
Role of body language in presentation delivery. Body language practice game.

Explanation of an exercise to practice presentation delivery.
Presentation delivery exercise I: Model talk selection and analysis of the selected talk part (transcript, nonverbal analysis)
Presentation delivery exercise II: Talk analysis and delivery practice in group, group feedback
Presentation delivery exercise III: Delivery of the selected talk to the audience, audience feedback.

How to prepare presentation? Lecture
How to search for scientific information? Demonstration
Presentation preparation I: Topic selection, gathering information (group work in English)

Sentence construction exercise
Presentation preparation II: Summary of obtained information, short summary (abstract) preparation (group work in English)

Sentence construction exercise
Presentation preparation III: Abstract reading. Speech preparation (group work in English)
Presentation preparation IV: Speech finalization and slide preparation (group work in English)
Presentation preparation V: Finalizing the presentation (group work in English). Practicing presentation delivery (body language) Q&A session (Q&A exercise)
Presentation delivery practice (individual and group practice)
Discussion on the final presentation topic (discussion skills practice). Wrap up. Self-evaluation quiz II, Feedback form

textbooks:
Materials will be provided
参考書: 「International Conference English」 石井 隆之；石井 隆之+松本 恵美子、ベル出版
「世界で戦う 英語のロジカルプレゼン」 浅見 ベートーベン、明日香出版社
"New International Business English" Leo Jones, Richard Alexander, Cambridge University Press
"Presenting" Susan Lowe and Louise Pile, Delta Publishing
prereq: Basic English knowledge, interest for discussion and making presentation in English
prep: English vocabulary study, material collection and presentation preparation

小レポートはメール送信です。
学習意欲・授業参加度はグループワークの意欲・参加度です。
期末試験は最終発表（Final Presentation）です。

extra.label: オフィスアワーに関する補足

extra.text:
有
教員の実務経験との関連
Teacher has an extensive experience with scientific English communication, such as contacting other researchers with e-mails, delivery presentations on the international scientific meetings, working at research institutions abroad.

extra.label: 授業形態
extra.text:
口頭での質疑やディスカッションを含む
授業中や授業時間外のグループワークを含む
